text:
Created attachment 203900
imapsync update to 1.882

There is new version of mail/imapsync published some time ago. I've made a patch which covers this update.

I've tested it with poudriere. You can check logfile at http://pkg.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/11x64-testing/2019-04-22_21h44m09s/logs/imapsync-1.882.log
